title: Numbers and Math

contentBlocks.text: Python can do math for you. Try the basics: + add, - subtract, * multiply, / divide.

contentBlocks.code:
apples = 3
oranges = 5
total = apples + oranges
print(total)

contentBlocks.text: Create a variable named total that equals 7 times 6, then print it.

starterCode: # Multiply 7 by 6 and store it in a variable called total

testCases.failureMessage: Make sure total is set to 7 * 6.

hints: Use the * symbol for multiplication: total = 7 * 6
Don't forget to print(total) so you can see the answer.
